title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Skill Brief: Version Migration
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext version migration increment in a skill test and release harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Version behavior changes and provide migration notes for consumers.
Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Version Migration
steps.instruction:

steps.title: Build Version Migration evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-version-migration-nwq7m6: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Version Migration into observable performance evidence.

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Defend the Version Migration model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Version Migration applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Version behavior changes and provide migration notes for consumers.
